tasks.subject: Task 1: Tokens + secondary card demotion
tasks.description:
Swap palette, add serif + hero-rhythm tokens, drop shadows, soften borders. Demote Timeline / Recent flow / Today Top / Health card density (padding, type, row height, no shadow).

Files: web/styles.css

Acceptance:
- --bg0 #fbfaf7, --text2 #7a7066, --border0 #ebe4d4, --shadow none
- --serif and --hero1..5 tokens present
- .card has no shadow
- timeline/flow/top numeric sizes and row heights demoted per spec table

Verify: node_modules/.bin/playwright test tests/web-ui-pages.spec.mjs (6 tests pass)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["web/styles.css"], "verifyCommand": "node_modules/.bin/playwright test tests/web-ui-pages.spec.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["palette swapped", "serif/hero tokens present", "no card shadow", "secondary card sizes per spec"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Right-now card
tasks.description:
Replace .now-card (which currently sits in .hero-grid) with a #rightNow block at the top of .side-stack.

Files: web/index.html, web/app.js, tests/web-ui-pages.spec.mjs

Acceptance:
- index.html no longer contains now-card; contains #rightNow <aside>
- app.js has renderRightNow(model)
- Playwright: stale-audio tests rewritten to assert #rightNow

Verify: playwright test (8 pass after Task 3 changes)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["web/index.html", "web/app.js", "web/styles.css", "tests/web-ui-pages.spec.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "node_modules/.bin/playwright test tests/web-ui-pages.spec.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["now-card removed", "rightNow wired", "audio-stale tests pass"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Editorial hero block
tasks.description:
Replace .hero-grid body with #hero populated by renderHero(model). Eyebrow / serif headline / sub / 4-cell numerals. Mobile downsizing 980px / 700px. Widen side rail to 1.4fr/1fr.

Files: web/app.js, web/styles.css, tests/web-ui-pages.spec.mjs

Acceptance:
- #hero in index.html and populated on load
- headline uses serif (computed font-family contains 'serif')
- 4 numerals visible: FOCUS / AUDIO / SWITCHES / EVENTS
- mobile <=700px -> h1 font-size <= 32px
- .workbench-grid 1.4fr / 1fr

Verify: playwright test (8 pass)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["web/app.js", "web/styles.css", "tests/web-ui-pages.spec.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "node_modules/.bin/playwright test tests/web-ui-pages.spec.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hero renders serif headline", "4-cell numerals row present", "mobile downsizes <=32px", "workbench columns 1.4/1"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Settings visual treatment
tasks.description:
Inherit new tokens. Caps-tag label style. Retune .toggle. No markup changes.

Files: web/styles.css

Acceptance:
- label span caps-tag style (uppercase, letter-spacing)
- .toggle uses surface1 + accent0 checkbox colour
- settings tests still pass

Verify: playwright test (8 still pass)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["web/styles.css"], "verifyCommand": "node_modules/.bin/playwright test tests/web-ui-pages.spec.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["label caps style applied", "toggle palette retuned", "no markup change"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Update tests + verify with user
tasks.description:
Update tests/test_http_api.py to match new DOM. Run full test suite. Verify with user.

Files: tests/test_http_api.py

Acceptance:
- test_http_api asserts id=hero, id=rightNow, renderHero, renderRightNow in script, .hero-block/.hero-headline in styles
- full pytest (config + http_api + skill_scripts) passes
- Playwright + node:test pass
- user confirms visual result

Verify: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ && playwright test && node --test extension/service_worker.test.mjs && AskUserQuestion

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_http_api.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ --ignore=tests/web-ui-pages.spec.mjs -x --tb=short", "acceptanceCriteria": ["http_api tests pass", "full pytest passes", "Playwright + node tests pass", "user confirms visual result"], "requiresUserVerification": true, "userVerificationPrompt": "Open the LocalTrace Web UI and confirm the editorial direction reads correctly (one serif hero + demoted secondary cards)?"}
```
